title: Spatial Intelligence and Mise-en-scene
objective: Formalize color, light, depth, and metaphor systems as decision rules. Create a spatial grammar mapping scene semantics to composition choices. Build a visual metaphor dictionary.
storyQuestions: Can color temperature be modeled as a continuous function of narrative threat level?
How should depth-of-field interact with information density?
Can we build a visual metaphor dictionary mapping narrative concepts to composition patterns?
What are the mise-en-scene signatures for different thriller sub-genres?
baseAcceptanceChecks: Color/light decision rules formalized (not just descriptions)
Depth-of-field choice linked to information density model
At least 3 mise-en-scene templates for thriller sub-genres
